case_title: CISNE, KENNETH J. JR. VS PALMA, GUSTAVO

docket_entries.description: CERT. LETTER TO GUSTAVO PALMA RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY CISNE, KENNETH J. JR. AS TO DEFENDANT PALMA, GUSTAVO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF APR-19-1993, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT PALMA, GUSTAVO

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CISNE, KENNETH J. JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALMA, GUSTAVO $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-28-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT PALMA, GUSTAVO HEARING SET FOR APR-19-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
